event: RT-PCR swab tested positive for SARS-CoV-2 infection
admitted in a COVID-19 infirmary unit
Escherichia coli detected on sputum culture
methicillin-sensitive Staphylococcus aureus detected on sputum culture
blood culture revealed methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus
thoracalgia irradiating to the left upper limb
abduction and external rotation limited due to pain
soft tissue swelling of the shoulder and arm
admitted for further investigation and treatment planning
thoracic CT with intravenous contrast administration
bilateral shoulder magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) with intravenous contrast administration
infraspinatus fossa and subscapular fossa collections
capsular thickening and increased signal intensity post-gadolinium administration
septic arthritis and rotator cuff collections
aspiration of the infraspinatus fossa collection
drainage catheter left on the left infraspinatus collection
improvement of left shoulder range of motion
indication to continue physical therapy and rehabilitation exercises
